title: phleum boissieri
intro: Phleum boissieri, also known as Boissier's meadow grass or hard fescue, is a species of grass native to the Mediterranean region and parts of Europe. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Phleum boissieri include its ability to soothe and calm digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. Herbal preparations of Phleum boissieri can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to support overall health and well-being.
